Name: FSlateBrush
Description: An brush which contains information about how to draw a Slate element

Variables.Name: ImageSize
Variables.Description: Size of the resource in Slate Units

Variables.Name: Margin
Variables.Description: The margin to use in Box and Border modes

Variables.Name: ResourceObject
Variables.Description:
The image to render for this brush, can be a UTexture or UMaterialInterface or an object implementing 
	  the AtlasedTextureInterface.

Variables.Name: ResourceName
Variables.Description: The name of the rendering resource to use

Variables.Name: UVRegion
Variables.Description:
Optional UV region for an image
	   When valid - overrides UV region specified in resource proxy

Variables.Name: Tiling
Variables.Description: How to tile the image in Image mode

Variables.Name: Mirroring
Variables.Description:
How to mirror the image in Image mode.  This is normally only used for dynamic image brushes where the source texture
	    comes from a hardware device such as a web camera.

Variables.Name: bIsDynamicallyLoaded
Variables.Description: Whether or not the brush path is a path to a UObject

Variables.Name: bHasUObject_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Whether or not the brush has a UTexture resource
